problem id: a56a80ac
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(6) OR SHR(1)) AND ROT(5)

examples:
  00110000 -> 00000000
  11010111 -> 11101010
  01100011 -> 01100000
  00110010 -> 00000000
  00000101 -> 00000000
  01010110 -> 10001010
  00111110 -> 10000111
  00001100 -> 00000000

query: 01010011
predicted answer: 01101000
